blockingIssues.description: Success-path test `test_refreshAll_withSuccessfulPersistence_allowsCursorAdvance` only asserts cursor existence after refresh, but the cursor is created before refresh and the assertion does not prove `runScheduledBackfillIfNeeded` advanced the cursor on successful persistence.

Failure-path test `test_refreshAll_withPersistenceFailure_preventsCursorAdvance` infers guard behavior from unchanged cursor state without proving the guarded persistence error path in `refreshAll`; it can pass due to other read-only write failures and does not conclusively verify commit-coupled advancement gating.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen handoff traceability guidance so feature handoffs reference the implementation commit(s) that introduced behavioral changes, not only follow-up validation-artifact commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for `m4-fix-backfill-idempotent-equal-timestamp-semantics` found handoff commit `38b3ada...` changed only `.factory/validation/**`, while the monotonic behavior fix lived in earlier commit `65706b3...`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Require startup context-read evidence in handoff before setting followedProcedure=true.
